zh.lifeSummary: 當Lora de Pilkington於大約1364年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，她的父親Roger de Pilkington III40歲，母親Ann Savage38歲。她於1398年與Sir Lawrence Standish在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1424年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lora de Pilkington于大约1364年出生在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什时，她的父亲Roger de Pilkington III40岁，母亲Ann Savage38岁。她于1398年与Sir Lawrence Standish在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1424年在英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pilkington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from a place in Lancashire. The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Pīleca or Pīloc + patronymic -ing + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is established in Ireland, where its presence was first recorded in the early 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lora de Pilkington was born about 1364, in Standish, Lancashire, England, her father, Roger de Pilkington III, was 40 and her mother, Ann Savage, was 38. She married Sir Lawrence Standish in 1398, in Standish, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1424, in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lora de Pilkington est née environ 1364, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Pilkington III, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ann Savage, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Lawrence Standish en 1398, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1424, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lora de Pilkington um 1364 in Standish, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Pilkington III 40 und ihre Mutter Ann Savage 38. Sie hat 1398 in Standish, Lancashire, England Sir Lawrence Standish geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1424 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lora de Pilkington è nata il circa 1364 nel Standish, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Roger de Pilkington III, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Ann Savage, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Lawrence Standish nel 1398, nel Standish, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1424, nel Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lora de Pilkingtonが約1364年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた時，父Roger de Pilkington IIIは40歳，母Ann Savageは38歳であった。1398年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュでSir Lawrence Standishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1424年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lora de Pilkington(이)가 대략 1364년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Pilkington III(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Savage(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1398년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 Sir Lawrence Standish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lora de Pilkington nasceu aproximadamente 1364, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Pilkington III, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ann Savage, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Lawrence Standish em 1398, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1424, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lora de Pilkington родилась около 1364 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Pilkington III было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Savage, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Lawrence Standish в 1398 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1424 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lora de Pilkington nació aproximadamente 1364, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Pilkington III, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ann Savage, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Lawrence Standish en 1398, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1424, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
